evals.query: what pipelines are currently failing across OSDU services?
show me all open merge requests for the storage and partition services
which OSDU services had failed CI jobs in the last 24 hours on the azure provider?
how is the M26 milestone looking? any services behind schedule?
are there any open issues tagged as critical across the OSDU platform?
give me a summary of CI pipeline status for all OSDU services — I want to know what's red
what MRs are waiting for review across the platform? I need to see if anything is stalled
show me failed jobs on the GCP cloud provider for the last week
how reliable are the partition service tests? are there flaky tests I should worry about?
what's the pass rate for search API tests across all environments?
who are the top contributors to OSDU this quarter? show me commit counts by person
which teams are most active in reviewing merge requests?
create a merge request for my feature branch on the partition repo and assign alice as reviewer
run the smoke tests on cimpl/lab and show me the results
fix the terraform policy violation in the infra module
check the dependencies for os-storage and find any CVEs
